TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Salaka-cani-zen:"Sila-yi ő£őĪŌĀőĪőļőĪŌĄŌÉő¨őĹőŅőĻ, Ingu: Sarakatsani" muenengay i Sila a binacadan, u daduducen a nipahutin tu katalan ku sakaudip nuheni, u Sila a Yun-cu-min, sibiyaw tu Paw-cia-li-ya, Ae-pa-ni-ya tipan atu Ma-ci-tun kunhekuo idaw ku adidiay anika kenhan nu tademaw. itini i likisi, Salaka-cani-zen itida i Pentu-se buyuan atu Sila kitidaan a duma nu buyuan ku tatelungan, ayda han caaytu pahutin tu katalan ku sakaudip nuheni, mala macimaciantu ku kaadihan nuheni. amica kunikay kudin zitay atu cunseci zetay adidi' tu kunipikilukan, nika sakamusa ku siace Salaka-cani-zen u Sila a tademaw sa, akay haw nu Sila kudin zitay nu ayawan a dayday nu pahutinay tu katalan a tadeamw. likucu tu nakamuan tu sikining, atu daduduce a lalangaw atu siakay nu dumaan. sipakayni i yiyunsia atu wuce lalangawan a nakamuan, itidaay i buyuay caay pilihida tu pina nu secian a Duoli-an-zen u tapang nu Salaka-cani-zen. tunikaw u tapang mapathekal tu hatiniay nu tenes a kanamuhan, sisa idaw ku yadahay tayda i liwliw nu Salaka-cani-zen miadih lalangawan śĖáŚĆĖ Salaka-cani-zen a kamu u Sila-yi a amisan nu nakamuan tu Salaka-cani-yi, duma satu idaw ku aydaay nu Sila-yi a masumaday pasu nu Ku-sila-yi. u nalimaan nuheni pasu dadiw, palaw dadiw nu sisiw, atu aadihan tuni tuktukan tu sapadan atu nipihacacaya tu dinum amitusul i dikudikucan, mahida u Ku-sila tusi kalimucuay a nalimaan misengi. itini i padekuan, idaw ku natinenga nuheni tu sasapayuen, mahida u lutuk nu sasapayuen, cemit atu idang nu sidi. 7 aenengan, dikuc atu caca'bayan a dawa sisa ina Salaka-cani-zen mala micidekay a siakay atu mapulungay nu lalangawan, u Sila nipahetikan nu babalaki, nika caay kaw adidiay nu binacadan ku nuheni. ayda hantu, Salaka-cani-zen alesen tu nuheni ku sapahutin tu katala a kawawan, milecad tu Sila a tademaw ku nikaudip, nika paicelang ku nuheni midiput tu nihetik nu babalaki a lalangawan. Salaka-cani-zen u Sila tatengaay nu sinciaan, hina pulung tu Sila kiwkay, paudipay a wama masawama nu waywayan a kamu, mahida midiputay atu pahabaya tu lalabu nu lumaan, atu misaybang tu micidekay a wayway nu la'cus atu masaybangay. Hinisa, idaw tu kuni patukil tu nanuwama, Mali-ya atu ci Ye-su a kankian, wama han u wama nu luma', situngus tu sakaudip nu luma, tu payluma' kanca misiteked tu kiwkay. ciwlu a kiwkay atu nu dumaan a sincia pulung han nuheni, caay palutatengaay tu kiwkayan atu siki u dayday nu Salaka-cani-zen, nika inai' ku matatungusay nu mapalaway a tademaw. Salaka-cani-zen limulak tu Sen-ciw-ce atu Sende-muote'-liw u lisin nu kiwkay a demiad, inuaayaw uyni a pilutucan atu kasienawan nuheni a mabulaw. picidekan nu Sen-ciw-ce a lisin nu kiwkay, payluma' kanca mipacuk tu cacaya a sidian patudung tu sinzin, ninakawaw situdung tu Kulisimase a dimiadan atu nika hukace ni Ye-su a dimiad, tawya pihukacean a demiad nuyda a lipay u Salaka-cani-zen saetimay nu sikian a demiad. i tatengaay nu Kili-setu nu dumaan a kakiningan idaw ku kakikungan atu sapitadem nu sikian, nikudanay milabuac tu mabelecay nu lalumaan, pasupulung nu lalumaan, palecad han atu mapataya a lisin. kanca u tatayna kusitungusay tu kawaw, milabuway han u madapunuhay ku yadahay. nipasingding nu kiwkay palutatenga namin tunika tayni ni Ye-suan, tina kawawan, kili-setu pakaynin i binawlan macunus ku picidekan a kawawan. .
S.PHON: sar~…ĺaka- ¶ani-z…ôn:"sir~…ĺa-ji ************, iŇču: sarakatsani" mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i sir~…ĺa a bina ¶adan, u dadudu ¶…ôn a nipańßutin tu katar~…ĺan ku sakaudip nuńß…ôni, u sir~…ĺa a jun- ¶u-min, sibijaw tu paw- ¶ia-r~…ĺi-ja, a…ô-pa-ni-ja tipan atu ma- ¶i-tun kunńß…ôkuo idaw ku adidiaj anika k…ônńßan nu tad…ômaw. itini i r~…ĺikisi, sar~…ĺaka- ¶ani-z…ôn itida i p…ôntu-s…ô bujuan atu sir~…ĺa kitidaan a duma nu bujuan ku tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan, ajda ńßan ¶aajtu pańßutin tu katar~…ĺan ku sakaudip nuńß…ôni, mar~…ĺa ma ¶ima ¶iantu ku kaadińßan nuńß…ôni. ami ¶a kunikaj kudin zitaj atu ¶uns…ô ¶i z…ôtaj adidi Ē~ ° tu kunipikir~…ĺukan, nika sakamusa ku sia ¶…ô sar~…ĺaka- ¶ani-z…ôn u sir~…ĺa a tad…ômaw sa, akaj ńßaw nu sir~…ĺa kudin zitaj nu ajawan a dajdaj nu pańßutinaj tu katar~…ĺan a tad…ôamw. r~…ĺiku ¶u tu nakamuan tu sikiniŇč, atu dadudu ¶…ô a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw atu siakaj nu dumaan. sipakajni i jijunsia atu wu ¶…ô r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a nakamuan, itidaaj i bujuaj ¶aaj pir~…ĺińßida tu pina nu s…ô ¶ian a duor~…ĺi-an-z…ôn u tapaŇč nu sar~…ĺaka- ¶ani-z…ôn. tunikaw u tapaŇč mapatńß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ńßatiniaj nu t…ôn…ôs a kanamuńßan, sisa idaw ku jadańßaj tajda i r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu sar~…ĺaka- ¶ani-z…ôn miadińß r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ** sar~…ĺaka- ¶ani-z…ôn a kamu u sir~…ĺa-ji a amisan nu nakamuan tu sar~…ĺaka- ¶ani-ji, duma satu idaw ku ajdaaj nu sir~…ĺa-ji a masumadaj pasu nu ku-sir~…ĺa-ji. u nar~…ĺimaan nuńß…ôni pasu dadiw, par~…ĺaw dadiw nu sisiw, atu aadińßan tuni tuktukan tu sapadan atu nipińßa ¶a ¶aja tu dinum amitusur~…ĺ i dikudiku ¶an, mańßida u ku-sir~…ĺa tusi kar~…ĺimu ¶uaj a nar~…ĺimaan mis…ôŇči. itini i pad…ôkuan, idaw ku natin…ôŇča nuńß…ôni tu sasapaju…ôn, mańßida u r~…ĺutuk nu sasapaju…ôn, ¶…ômit atu idaŇč nu sidi. * a…ôn…ôŇčan, diku ¶ atu ¶a ¶a Ē~ °bajan a dawa sisa ina sar~…ĺaka- ¶ani-z…ôn mar~…ĺa mi ¶id…ôkaj a siakaj atu mapur~…ĺuŇčaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, u sir~…ĺa nipańß…ôtikan nu babar~…ĺaki, nika ¶aaj kaw adidiaj nu bina ¶adan ku nuńß…ôni. ajda ńßantu, sar~…ĺaka- ¶ani-z…ôn ar~…ĺ…ôs…ôn tu nuńß…ôni ku sapańßutin tu katar~…ĺa a kawawan, mir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu sir~…ĺa a tad…ômaw ku nikaudip, nika pai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku nuńß…ôni midiput tu nińß…ôtik nu babar~…ĺaki a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. sar~…ĺaka- ¶ani-z…ôn u sir~…ĺa tat…ôŇčaaj nu sin ¶iaan, ńßina pur~…ĺuŇč tu sir~…ĺa kiwkaj, paudipaj a wama masawama nu wajwajan a kamu, mańßida midiputaj atu pańßabaja tu r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺumaan, atu misajbaŇč tu mi ¶id…ôkaj a wajwaj nu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us atu masajbaŇčaj. ńßinisa, idaw tu kuni patukir~…ĺ tu nanuwama, mar~…ĺi-ja atu ¶i j…ô-su a kankian, wama ńßan u wama nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, situŇčus tu sakaudip nu r~…ĺuma, tu pajr~…ĺuma Ē~ ° kan ¶a misit…ôk…ôd tu kiwkaj. ¶iwr~…ĺu a kiwkaj atu nu dumaan a sin ¶ia pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan nuńß…ôni, ¶aaj par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaaj tu kiwkajan atu siki u dajdaj nu sar~…ĺaka- ¶ani-z…ôn, nika inai Ē~ ° ku matatuŇčusaj nu mapar~…ĺawaj a tad…ômaw. sar~…ĺaka- ¶ani-z…ôn r~…ĺimur~…ĺak tu s…ôn- ¶iw- ¶…ô atu s…ônd…ô-muot…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺiw u r~…ĺisin nu kiwkaj a d…ômiad, inuaajaw ujni a pir~…ĺutu ¶an atu kasi…ônawan nuńß…ôni a mabur~…ĺaw. pi ¶id…ôkan nu s…ôn- ¶iw- ¶…ô a r~…ĺisin nu kiwkaj, pajr~…ĺuma Ē~ ° kan ¶a mipa ¶uk tu ¶a ¶aja a sidian patuduŇč tu sinzin, ninakawaw situduŇč tu kur~…ĺisimas…ô a dimiadan atu nika ńßuka ¶…ô ni j…ô-su a dimiad, tawja pińßuka ¶…ôan a d…ômiad nujda a r~…ĺipaj u sar~…ĺaka- ¶ani-z…ôn sa…ôtimaj nu sikian a d…ômiad. i tat…ôŇčaaj nu kir~…ĺi-s…ôtu nu dumaan a kakiniŇčan idaw ku kakikuŇčan atu sapitad…ôm nu sikian, nikudanaj mir~…ĺabua ¶ tu mab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶aj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan, pasupur~…ĺuŇč nu r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan, par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ńßan atu mapataja a r~…ĺisin. kan ¶a u tatajna kusituŇčusaj tu kawaw, mir~…ĺabuwaj ńßan u madapunuńßaj ku jadańßaj. nipasiŇčdiŇč nu kiwkaj par~…ĺutat…ôŇča namin tunika tajni ni j…ô-suan, tina kawawan, kir~…ĺi-s…ôtu pakajnin i binawr~…ĺan ma ¶unus ku pi ¶id…ôkan a kawawan. .
S.FORM: Salaka-cani-zen:"Sila-yi ő£őĪŌĀőĪőļőĪŌĄŌÉő¨őĹőŅőĻ, Ingu: Sarakatsani" muenengay i Sila a binacadan, u daduducen a nipahutin tu katalan ku sakaudip nuheni, u Sila a Yun-cu-min, sibiyaw tu Paw-cia-li-ya, Ae-pa-ni-ya tipan atu Ma-ci-tun kunhekuo idaw ku adidiay anika kenhan nu tademaw. itini i likisi, Salaka-cani-zen itida i Pentu-se buyuan atu Sila kitidaan a duma nu buyuan ku tatelungan, ayda han caaytu pahutin tu katalan ku sakaudip nuheni, mala macimaciantu ku kaadihan nuheni. amica kunikay kudin zitay atu cunseci zetay adidi' tu kunipikilukan, nika sakamusa ku siace Salaka-cani-zen u Sila a tademaw sa, akay haw nu Sila kudin zitay nu ayawan a dayday nu pahutinay tu katalan a tadeamw. likucu tu nakamuan tu sikining, atu daduduce a lalangaw atu siakay nu dumaan. sipakayni i yiyunsia atu wuce lalangawan a nakamuan, itidaay i buyuay caay pilihida tu pina nu secian a Duoli-an-zen u tapang nu Salaka-cani-zen. tunikaw u tapang mapathekal tu hatiniay nu tenes a kanamuhan, sisa idaw ku yadahay tayda i liwliw nu Salaka-cani-zen miadih lalangawan śĖáŚĆĖ Salaka-cani-zen a kamu u Sila-yi a amisan nu nakamuan tu Salaka-cani-yi, duma satu idaw ku aydaay nu Sila-yi a masumaday pasu nu Ku-sila-yi. u nalimaan nuheni pasu dadiw, palaw dadiw nu sisiw, atu aadihan tuni tuktukan tu sapadan atu nipihacacaya tu dinum amitusul i dikudikucan, mahida u Ku-sila tusi kalimucuay a nalimaan misengi. itini i padekuan, idaw ku natinenga nuheni tu sasapayuen, mahida u lutuk nu sasapayuen, cemit atu idang nu sidi. 7 aenengan, dikuc atu caca'bayan a dawa sisa ina Salaka-cani-zen mala micidekay a siakay atu mapulungay nu lalangawan, u Sila nipahetikan nu babalaki, nika caay kaw adidiay nu binacadan ku nuheni. ayda hantu, Salaka-cani-zen alesen tu nuheni ku sapahutin tu katala a kawawan, milecad tu Sila a tademaw ku nikaudip, nika paicelang ku nuheni midiput tu nihetik nu babalaki a lalangawan. Salaka-cani-zen u Sila tatengaay nu sinciaan, hina pulung tu Sila kiwkay, paudipay a wama masawama nu waywayan a kamu, mahida midiputay atu pahabaya tu lalabu nu lumaan, atu misaybang tu micidekay a wayway nu la'cus atu masaybangay. Hinisa, idaw tu kuni patukil tu nanuwama, Mali-ya atu ci Ye-su a kankian, wama han u wama nu luma', situngus tu sakaudip nu luma, tu payluma' kanca misiteked tu kiwkay. ciwlu a kiwkay atu nu dumaan a sincia pulung han nuheni, caay palutatengaay tu kiwkayan atu siki u dayday nu Salaka-cani-zen, nika inai' ku matatungusay nu mapalaway a tademaw. Salaka-cani-zen limulak tu Sen-ciw-ce atu Sende-muote'-liw u lisin nu kiwkay a demiad, inuaayaw uyni a pilutucan atu kasienawan nuheni a mabulaw. picidekan nu Sen-ciw-ce a lisin nu kiwkay, payluma' kanca mipacuk tu cacaya a sidian patudung tu sinzin, ninakawaw situdung tu Kulisimase a dimiadan atu nika hukace ni Ye-su a dimiad, tawya pihukacean a demiad nuyda a lipay u Salaka-cani-zen saetimay nu sikian a demiad. i tatengaay nu Kili-setu nu dumaan a kakiningan idaw ku kakikungan atu sapitadem nu sikian, nikudanay milabuac tu mabelecay nu lalumaan, pasupulung nu lalumaan, palecad han atu mapataya a lisin. kanca u tatayna kusitungusay tu kawaw, milabuway han u madapunuhay ku yadahay. nipasingding nu kiwkay palutatenga namin tunika tayni ni Ye-suan, tina kawawan, kili-setu pakaynin i binawlan macunus ku picidekan a kawawan. .

sibijaw tu paw- ¶ia-r~…ĺi-ja, a…ô-pa-ni-ja tipan atu ma- ¶i-tun kunńß…ôkuo idaw ku adidiaj anika k…ônńßan nu tad…ômaw. itini i r~…ĺikisi, sar~…ĺaka- ¶ani-z…ôn itida i p…ôntu-s…ô bujuan atu sir~…ĺa kitidaan a duma nu bujuan ku tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan, ajda ńßan ¶aajtu pańßutin tu katar~…ĺan ku sakaudip nuńß…ôni, mar~…ĺa ma ¶ima ¶iantu ku kaadińßan nuńß…ôni. ami ¶a kunikaj kudin zitaj atu ¶uns…ô ¶i z…ôtaj adidi Ē~ ° tu kunipikir~…ĺukan, nika sakamusa ku sia ¶…ô sar~…ĺaka- ¶ani-z…ôn u sir~…ĺa a tad…ômaw sa, akaj ńßaw nu sir~…ĺa kudin zitaj nu ajawan a dajdaj nu pańßutinaj tu katar~…ĺan a tad…ôamw. r~…ĺiku ¶u tu nakamuan tu sikiniŇč, atu dadudu ¶…ô a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw atu siakaj nu dumaan. sipakajni i jijunsia atu wu ¶…ô r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a nakamuan, itidaaj i bujuaj ¶aaj pir~…ĺińßida tu pina nu s…ô ¶ian a duor~…ĺi-an-z…ôn u tapaŇč nu sar~…ĺaka- ¶ani-z…ôn. tunikaw u tapaŇč mapatńß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ńßatiniaj nu t…ôn…ôs a kanamuńßan, sisa idaw ku jadańßaj tajda i r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu sar~…ĺaka- ¶ani-z…ôn miadińß r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ** sar~…ĺaka- ¶ani-z…ôn a kamu u sir~…ĺa-ji a amisan nu nakamuan tu sar~…ĺaka- ¶ani-ji, duma satu idaw ku ajdaaj nu sir~…ĺa-ji a masumadaj pasu nu ku-sir~…ĺa-ji. u nar~…ĺimaan nuńß…ôni pasu dadiw, par~…ĺaw dadiw nu sisiw, atu aadińßan tuni tuktukan tu sapadan atu nipińßa ¶a ¶aja tu dinum amitusur~…ĺ i dikudiku ¶an, mańßida u ku-sir~…ĺa tusi kar~…ĺimu ¶uaj a nar~…ĺimaan mis…ôŇči. itini i pad…ôkuan, idaw ku natin…ôŇča nuńß…ôni tu sasapaju…ôn, mańßida u r~…ĺutuk nu sasapaju…ôn, ¶…ômit atu idaŇč nu sidi. * a…ôn…ôŇčan, diku ¶ atu ¶a ¶a Ē~ °bajan a dawa sisa ina sar~…ĺaka- ¶ani-z…ôn mar~…ĺa mi ¶id…ôkaj a siakaj atu mapur~…ĺuŇčaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, u sir~…ĺa nipańß…ôtikan nu babar~…ĺaki, nika ¶aaj kaw adidiaj nu bina ¶adan ku nuńß…ôni. ajda ńßantu, sar~…ĺaka- ¶ani-z…ôn ar~…ĺ…ôs…ôn tu nuńß…ôni ku sapańßutin tu katar~…ĺa a kawawan, mir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu sir~…ĺa a tad…ômaw ku nikaudip, nika pai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku nuńß…ôni midiput tu nińß…ôtik nu babar~…ĺaki a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. sar~…ĺaka- ¶ani-z…ôn u sir~…ĺa tat…ôŇčaaj nu sin ¶iaan, ńßina pur~…ĺuŇč tu sir~…ĺa kiwkaj, paudipaj a wama masawama nu wajwajan a kamu, mańßida midiputaj atu pańßabaja tu r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺumaan, atu misajbaŇč tu mi ¶id…ôkaj a wajwaj nu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us atu masajbaŇčaj. ńßinisa, idaw tu kuni patukir~…ĺ tu nanuwama, mar~…ĺi-ja atu ¶i j…ô-su a kankian, wama ńßan u wama atu siki u dajdaj nu sar~…ĺaka- ¶ani-z…ôn, nika inai Ē~ ° ku matatuŇčusaj nu mapar~…ĺawaj a tad…ômaw. sar~…ĺaka- ¶ani-z…ôn r~…ĺimur~…ĺak tu s…ôn- ¶iw- ¶…ô atu s…ônd…ô-muot…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺiw u r~…ĺisin nu kiwkaj a d…ômiad, inuaajaw ujni a pir~…ĺutu ¶an atu kasi…ônawan nuńß…ôni a mabur~…ĺaw. pi ¶id…ôkan nu s…ôn- ¶iw- ¶…ô a r~…ĺisin nu kiwkaj, pajr~…ĺuma Ē~ ° kan ¶a mipa ¶uk tu ¶a ¶aja a sidian patuduŇč tu sinzin, ninakawaw situduŇč tu kur~…ĺisimas…ô a dimiadan atu nika ńßuka ¶…ô ni j…ô-su a dimiad, tawja pińßuka ¶…ôan a d…ômiad nujda a r~…ĺipaj u sar~…ĺaka- ¶ani-z…ôn sa…ôtimaj nu sikian a d…ômiad. i tat…ôŇčaaj nu kir~…ĺi-s…ôtu nu dumaan a kakiniŇčan idaw ku kakikuŇčan atu sapitad…ôm nu sikian, nikudanaj mir~…ĺabua ¶ tu mab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶aj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan, pasupur~…ĺuŇč nu r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan, par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ńßan atu mapataja a r~…ĺisin. kan ¶a u tatajna kusituŇčusaj tu kawaw, mir~…ĺabuwaj ńßan u madapunuńßaj ku jadańßaj. nipasiŇčdiŇč nu kiwkaj par~…ĺutat…ôŇča namin tunika tajni ni j…ô-suan, tina kawawan, kir~…ĺi-s…ôtu pakajnin i binawr~…ĺan ma ¶unus ku pi ¶id…ôkan a kawawan. .
